## New `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

### Files Created (all under `packages/pixelart/`)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package config with `@ai-sdk/provider` & `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` dependencies |

| `vitest.node.config.js` | Vitest config for Node.js tests |
| `vitest.edge.config.js` | Vitest config for Edge runtime tests |
| **`src/index.ts`** | Public exports: `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, and all types |
| **`src/pixelart-provider.ts`** | `createPixelArt()` factory function & `PixelArtProvider` interface extending `ProviderV3`. Only exposes `image()`/`imageModel()` — throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding models |
| **`src/pixelart-image-model.ts`** | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3` with `doGenerate()`. POSTs to `{baseURL}/images/generations` with model, prompt, n, size, style, pixel_density, seed. Uses `parseProviderOptions` with a Zod schema for type-safe provider options |
| **`src/pixelart-image-settings.ts`** | Type exports: `PixelArtImageModelId` (`"pixelart-standard"` \| `"pixelart-hd"`), `PixelArtStyle` (`"pixel"` \| `"retro"` \| `"8bit"`), `PixelArtImageSettings` interface |
| **`src/version.ts`** | Build-time version injection pattern |

### Key Design Decisions
- **Follows the Black Forest Labs pattern** — the simplest image-only provider in the SDK
- **Base URL**: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` (configurable via `baseURL` option)
- **Auth**: Bearer token from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var (or `apiKey` option)
- **Provider options** (`providerOptions.pixelart`): `size` (string), `style` ("pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"), `pixelDensity` (number) — validated via Zod schema
- **TypeScript type-check passes cleanly** (`tsc --build` succeeds with zero errors)
